creator: Razi Khan
source_text:
The best homemade Carrot Cake! Packed with protein, lower in calories, and it comes out soft and fluffy every time. Here’s how to easily make it!👇🏽
-
Ingredients:
• 2 eggs
• 1/2 cup greek yogurt (0%)
• 1/2 cup any milk (I use 1%)
• 1 tsp vanilla extract
• 2 tsp coconut oil
• 1 heaping cup any flour (I use blended rolled oats)
• 2 scoops vanilla protein powder
• 1 tsp baking powder
• 1/2 tsp baking soda
• 1 tsp cinnamon
• 1/2 tsp ginger
• 1/3 cup any sweetener (I use stevia or splenda brown sugar)
• 1 cup grated carrot (or more to your liking)
-
Icing:
• 1/4 cup light cream cheese (I use 95% light)
• 1 tbsp any sweetener
• 1/4 tsp vanilla extract
• optional: 1/2 scoop vanilla protein powder
-
Baking Time:
• 350F for 28-30 minutes
-
Calories/Macros (per slice of 10):
• 97 calories
• 8.5g protein, 9g carbs, 3g fat
-
-
#recipe #carrotcake #healthy #dessert #homemade
